backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no methods defined.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence listing implemented features, related files, components, and confidence metadata.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose and functionality of each frontend file.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining design tokens, OKLCH colors, dark mode overrides, and global styles.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML document setting meta tags and loading the React entry script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router routes and provides the router to the app using a shared SiteLayout.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer displaying branding, navigation links, contact info, and a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/HeaderNav.tsx: Responsive header with desktop and mobile navigation, active link styling, and a mobile menu toggle.
frontend/src/components/Seo.tsx: SEO helper that sets the document title and meta description on mount.
frontend/src/components/SiteLayout.tsx: Page wrapper providing header, footer, and main content via an Outlet.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and manages a backend actor based on the user's identity, refetching when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context and hooks for managing Internet Identity login state, stored identities, and AuthClient creation.
frontend/src/index.css: Configures Tailwind layers and defines light/dark theme CSS variables with base typography and utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app, wrapping it with React Query and an Internet Identity provider.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Renders the About page with mission and values content plus SEO metadata.
frontend/src/pages/FaqPage.tsx: Displays an FAQ list using accordions with SEO metadata and a contact section.
frontend/src/pages/FeaturesPage.tsx: Shows a grid of feature cards with icons and descriptions along with SEO metadata.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page presenting a hero section, feature highlights, and app preview with SEO setup.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicyPage.tsx: Presents the privacy policy with principles, explanations, and SEO metadata.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending themes, colors, animations, and enabling plugins like typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Defines project metadata and requirements for a mobile‑first marketing website for the FinPocket app, including design notes, needed images, and feature lists for multiple pages.
